subcodes.first_line: O servant of God, when thou shalt unfurl the banner of majesty and raise aloft the standard of independence through servitude at His Threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی وقتی علم جلال برافرازی و رایت استقلال بلند کنی که بعبودیت آستان
subcodes.subjects: @attaining the life of the spirit, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
